  <div id="__bundler_thumbnail"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect width="100" height="100" fill="#2563eb"></rect><g transform="translate(50 50)" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="3" fill="none"><circle r="13"></circle><line x1="-9" y1="-9" x2="9" y2="9"></line><line x1="-9" y1="9" x2="9" y2="-9"></line></g></svg></div>

  <script>
    
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async function() {
  const loading = document.getElementById('__bundler_loading');
  function setStatus(msg) { if (loading) loading.textContent = msg; }

  // Error sink persists across replaceWith since it's on window, not the DOM.
  window.addEventListener('error', function(e) {
    var p = document.body || document.documentElement;
    var d = document.getElementById('__bundler_err') || p.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));
    d.id = '__bundler_err';
    d.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:12px;left:12px;right:12px;font:12px/1.4 ui-monospace,monospace;background:#2a1215;color:#ff8a80;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #5c2b2e;z-index:99999;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:40vh;overflow:auto';
    d.textContent = (d.textContent ? d.textContent + String.fromCharCode(10) : '') +
      '[bundle] ' + (e.message || e.type) +
      (e.filename ? ' (' + e.filename.slice(0, 60) + ':' + e.lineno + ')' : '');
  }, true);

  try {
    const manifestEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/manifest"]');
    const templateEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/template"]');
    if (!manifestEl || !templateEl) {
      setStatus('Error: missing bundle data');
      console.error('[bundler] Missing script tags — manifestEl:', !!manifestEl, 'templateEl:', !!templateEl);
      return;
    }

    const manifest = JSON.parse(manifestEl.textContent);
    let template = JSON.parse(templateEl.textContent);

    const uuids = Object.keys(manifest);
    setStatus('Unpacking ' + uuids.length + ' assets...');

    const blobUrls = {};
    await Promise.all(uuids.map(async (uuid) => {
      const entry = manifest[uuid];
      try {
        if (!entry.compressed && entry.mime.indexOf('image/') === 0) {
          blobUrls[uuid] = 'data:' + entry.mime + ';base64,' + entry.data;
          return;
        }
        const binaryStr = atob(entry.data);
        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryStr.length);
        for (let i = 0; i < binaryStr.length; i++) bytes[i] = binaryStr.charCodeAt(i);

        let finalBytes = bytes;
        if (entry.compressed) {
          if (typeof DecompressionStream !== 'undefined') {
            const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
            const writer = ds.writable.getWriter();
            const reader = ds.readable.getReader();
            writer.write(bytes);
            writer.close();
            const chunks = [];
            let totalLen = 0;
            while (true) {
              const { done, value } = await reader.read();
              if (done) break;
              chunks.push(value);
              totalLen += value.length;
            }
            finalBytes = new Uint8Array(totalLen);
            let offset = 0;
            for (const chunk of chunks) { finalBytes.set(chunk, offset); offset += chunk.length; }
          } else {
            console.warn('DecompressionStream not available, asset ' + uuid + ' may not render');
          }
        }

        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([finalBytes], { type: entry.mime }));
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Failed to decode asset ' + uuid + ':', err);
        blobUrls[uuid] = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([], { type: entry.mime }));
      }
    }));

    const extResEl = document.querySelector('script[type="__bundler/ext_resources"]');
    const extResources = extResEl ? JSON.parse(extResEl.textContent) : [];
    const resourceMap = {};
    for (const entry of extResources) {
      if (blobUrls[entry.uuid]) resourceMap[entry.id] = blobUrls[entry.uuid];
    }

    setStatus('Rendering...');
    for (const uuid of uuids) template = template.split(uuid).join(blobUrls[uuid]);

    // Strip integrity + crossorigin — blob URLs from a file:// document inherit
    // a null origin, so crossorigin forces a CORS fetch that SRI then rejects.
    // The manifest bytes are ours; SRI protects against CDN compromise, not this.
    template = template.replace(/\s+integrity="[^"]*"/gi, '').replace(/\s+crossorigin="[^"]*"/gi, '');

    const resourceScript = '<script>window.__resources = ' +
      JSON.stringify(resourceMap).split('</' + 'script>').join('<\\/' + 'script>') +
      ';</' + 'script>';
    // Inject after <head> so the DOCTYPE stays first; prepending the script
    // would push the parser into quirks mode. DOMParser always emits a <head>
    // (synthesizing one if the source HTML omitted it) but may carry
    // attributes through, so match the full opening tag. slice() rather than
    // replace() keeps us clear of $-pattern substitution in resourceScript.
    const headOpen = template.match(/<head[^>]*>/i);
    if (headOpen) {
      const i = headOpen.index + headOpen[0].length;
      template = template.slice(0, i) + resourceScript + template.slice(i);
    }

    // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via
    // DOMParser/replaceWith are inert per spec — re-create each with
    // createElement so they execute, awaiting onload for src scripts to
    // preserve ordering (React before ReactDOM before Babel before text/babel).
    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(template, 'text/html');
    document.documentElement.replaceWith(doc.documentElement);
    const dead = Array.from(document.scripts);
    for (const old of dead) {
      const s = document.createElement('script');
      for (const a of old.attributes) s.setAttribute(a.name, a.value);
      s.textContent = old.textContent;
      // text/babel scripts with a src: fetch and inline. transformScriptTags
      // does XHR against the src, but blob:null/ from a file:// origin is
      // silently dropped. Inlining makes it a plain inline babel script,
      // which transformScriptTags handles unconditionally.
      if ((s.type === 'text/babel' || s.type === 'text/jsx') && s.src) {
        const r = await fetch(s.src);
        s.textContent = await r.text();
        s.removeAttribute('src');
      }
      const p = s.src ? new Promise(function(r) { s.onload = s.onerror = r; }) : null;
      old.replaceWith(s);
      if (p) await p;
    }
    // Babel standalone auto-transforms type=text/babel on DOMContentLoaded,
    // which fired before we swapped the document. Trigger manually if present.
    if (window.Babel && typeof window.Babel.transformScriptTags === 'function') {
      window.Babel.transformScriptTags();
    }
  } catch (err) {
    setStatus('Error unpacking: ' + err.message);
    console.error('Bundle unpack error:', err);
  }
});

  </script>

];\n}\nfunction _sensorDeco(letter,color,r,sw){ // Melder-Auge: Buchstabe + Bogen mit Punkten\n  const arc=h('path',{key:'arc',d:`M ${r*0.25} ${-r*0.62} A ${r*0.78} ${r*0.78} 0 0 1 ${r*0.25} out;\n}\nfunction _labelBox(text,color,r,sw,opts){ opts=opts||{};\n  const w=Math.max(r*1.25, text.length*r*0.34 + r*0.45), hh=r*0.85;\n  const out=[ Math.max(1.6, r*0.15); const d = r*0.6;\n  // legacy aliases\n  if(type==='ceiling') type='lichtquelle';\n  if(type==='wall') type='lichtquelle_wand';\n  if(type==='socket') type='steckdose';\n  if(type==='sensor'||type==='switch'){ if(type==='switch') type='schalter'; else type='bewegungsmelder'; }\n  const circleX=(extra)=>{ const o=[ h('line',{key:'b',x1:-d,y1:d,x2:d,y2:-d,stroke:color,strokeWidth:sw}) ]; return extra?o.concat(extra):o; };\n  switch(type){\n    case 'lichtquelle': return circleX();\n    case 'lichtquelle_dim': type==='taster4'?'4':'1';\n      return [ h('path',{key:'p',d:`M ${-r*0.78} ${r*0.62} L ${-r*0.78} ${-r*0.1} L 0 ${-r*0.72} L ${r*0.78} ${-r*0.1} L ${r*0.78} ${r*0.62} Z`,fill:'#fff',stroke:color,strokeWidth:sw,strokeLinejoin:'round'}), h('line',{key:'s',x1:0,y1:r*0.62,x2:0,y2:r*1.1,stroke:color,strokeWidth:sw}), _t(num,0,r*0.18,r*0.78,color,{key:'n'}) ];\n    }\n    case 'steckdose': return _socket(color,r,sw);\n    case 'steckdose2': return _socket(color,r,sw,{label:'2'});\n    case 'steckdose5': return _socket(color,r,sw,{label:'5'});\n    case 'steckdose_schalt': return _socket(color,r,sw,{filled:true});\n    case 'steckdose_stark': return _socket(color,r,sw).concat([ _t('400V',0,-r*0.42,r*0.5,color,{key:'v',mono:true}) ]);\n    case 'bewegungsmelder': return _sensorDeco('B',color,r,sw);\n    case 'praesenzmelder': return _sensorDeco('P',color,r,sw);\n    case 'rauchmelder': return _detector(color,r,sw);\n    case 'hitzemelder': return _detector(color,r,sw).concat([ _t('H', r*1.15, -r*0.1, r*0.7, color, {key:'H'}) ]);\n    case 'temperatur': return [ circleX();\n  }\n}\n\nfunction makeIcon(kind, color){\n  color = color || '#4b5560';\n  if(kind==='select') return h('svg',{width:19,height:19,viewBox:'0 0 20 20'}, h('path',{d:'M4 3 L4 16.5 L7.6 13 L10.2 18.5 L12.3 17.5 L9.7 12 L14.6 12 Z',fill:color}));\n  if(kind==='pan') return h('svg',{width:19,height:19,viewBox:'0 0 20 20'}, h('path',{d:'M10 1.5 L12.4 4 H10.8 V9.2 H16 V7.6 L18.5 10 L16 12.4 V10.8 H10.8 V16 H12.4 L10 18.5 L7.6 16 H9.2 V10.8 H4 V12.4 L1.5 10 L4 7.6 V9.2 H9.2 V4 H7.6 Z',fill:color}));\n  if(kind==='cable') return h('svg',{width:19,height:19,viewBox:'0 0 20 20'}, h('polyline',{points:'2,15 7,15 7,6 13,6 13,14 18,14',fill:'none',stroke:color,strokeWidth:1.9,strokeLinejoin:'round',strokeLinecap:'round'}), h('circle',{cx:2,cy:15,r:1.7,fill:color}), h('circle',{cx:18,cy:14,r:1.7,fill:color}));\n  if(kind==='calibrate') return h('svg',{width:19,height:19,viewBox:'0 0 20 20'}, h('rect',{x:2,y:7,width:16,height:6,rx:1,fill:'none',stroke:color,strokeWidth:1.6}), h('line',{x1:6,y1:7,x2:6,y2:10,stroke:color,strokeWidth:1.3}), h('line',{x1:10,y1:7,x2:10,y2:11,stroke:color,strokeWidth:1.3}), h('line',{x1:14,y1:7,x2:14,y2:10,stroke:color,strokeWidth:1.3}));\n  return h('svg',{width:22,height:22,viewBox:'0 0 24 24',style:{overflow:'visible'}}, h('g',{transform:'translate(12,12)'}, ...symbolEls(kind, color, 8)));\n}\n\nclass Component extends DCLogic {\n  constructor(props){\n    super(props);\n    this._undo = [];\n    this.state = {\n      tool:'select', ortho:true,\n      elements:[], cables:[],\n      circuits:[{id:'c1', name:'Stromkreis 1', color:PALETTE[0]}],\n      activeCircuit:'c1',\n      activeCableType:'nym15',\n      selected:null,            // {kind:'element'|'cable', id}\n      draft:null,               // {points:[...]}\n      calib:null,               // {p1,p2}\n      showCalibInput:false, calibMeters:'',\n      scalePxPerM:null,\n      scale:0.3, tx:0, ty:0,\n      mouse:null,\n      planOpacity: (props.planOpacity!=null?props.planOpacity:1),\n      rightTab:'props',\n    };\n    this.setSvg = el => { this.svg = el; };\n    this.setArea = el => { this.area = el; };\n  }\n\n  componentDidMount(){\n    try{\n      const raw = localStorage.getItem(KEY);\n      if(raw){ const s = JSON.parse(raw); this.setState(st=>({\n        elements:s.elements||st.elements, cables:s.cables||st.cables,\n        circuits:s.circuits||st.circuits, activeCircuit:s.activeCircuit||st.activeCircuit,\n        scalePxPerM:(s.scalePxPerM!=null?s.scalePxPerM:st.scalePxPerM),\n        activeCableType:s.activeCableType||st.activeCableType,\n        scale:(s.view?s.view.scale:st.scale), tx:(s.view?s.view.tx:st.tx), ty:(s.view?s.view.ty:st.ty),\n        planOpacity:(s.planOpacity!=null?s.planOpacity:st.planOpacity),\n        _hadView:!!s.view,\n      })); }\n    }catch(e){}\n    this._wheel = e => this.onWheel(e);\n    this._key = e => this.onKey(e);\n    if(this.area) this.area.addEventListener('wheel', this._wheel, {passive:false});\n    window.addEventListener('keydown', this._key);\n    setTimeout(()=>{ if(!this.state._hadView) this.fit(); }, 60);\n    // preload plan for export\n    const img = new Image();\n    img.onload = () => { try{ const c=document.createElement('canvas'); c.width=img.naturalWidth; c.height=img.naturalHeight; c.getContext('2d').drawImage(img,0,0); this._planURL=c.toDataURL('image/png'); }catch(e){} };\n    img.src = 'plan.png';\n  }\n  componentWillUnmount(){\n    if(this.area) this.area.removeEventListener('wheel', this._wheel);\n    window.removeEventListener('keydown', this._key);\n  }\n\n  persist(){\n    clearTimeout(this._pt);\n    this._pt = setTimeout(()=>{\n      try{ const s=this.state; localStorage.setItem(KEY, JSON.stringify({\n        elements:s.elements, cables:s.cables, circuits:s.circuits,\n        activeCircuit:s.activeCircuit, scalePxPerM:s.scalePxPerM, activeCableType:s.activeCableType,\n        view:{scale:s.scale,tx:s.tx,ty:s.ty}, planOpacity:s.planOpacity\n      })); }catch(e){}\n    }, 250);\n  }\n  pushUndo(){ try{ this._undo.push(JSON.stringify({elements:this.state.elements,cables:this.state.cables,circuits:this.state.circuits,activeCircuit:this.state.activeCircuit})); if(this._undo.length>80) this._undo.shift(); }catch(e){} }\n  undo(){ if(!this._undo.length) return; const s=JSON.parse(this._undo.pop()); this.setState({elements:s.elements,cables:s.cables,circuits:s.circuits,activeCircuit:s.activeCircuit,selected:null,draft:null}, ()=>this.persist()); }\n\n  // ---- coords ----\n  planPoint(e){\n    const r = this.area && this.area.getBoundingClientRect();\n    if(!r) return {x:0,y:0};\n    const s=this.state;\n    return { x:(e.clientX-r.left-s.tx)/s.scale, y:(e.clientY-r.top-s.ty)/s.scale };\n  }\n  circColor(id){ const c=this.state.circuits.find(c=>c.id===id); return c?c.color:'#888'; }\n  fmtLen(px){ if(!this.state.scalePxPerM) return null; return (px/this.state.scalePxPerM).toFixed(2)+' m'; }\n  cableLenPx(pts){ let s=0; for(let i=1;i<pts.length;i++){ s+=Math.hypot(pts[i].x-pts[i-1].x, pts[i].y-pts[i-1].y);} return s; }\n\n  // ---- transform / zoom ----\n  clampScale(s){ return Math.min(Math.max(s, 0.05), 8); }\n  zoomAt(lx, ly, f){\n    const s=this.state; const ns=this.clampScale(s.scale*f); const k=ns/s.scale;\n    this.setState({ scale:ns, tx: lx-(lx-s.tx)*k, ty: ly-(ly-s.ty)*k }, ()=>this.persist());\n  }\n  onWheel(e){\n    e.preventDefault();\n    const r=this.area.getBoundingClientRect();\n    const f = e.deltaY<0 ? 1.12 : 1/1.12;\n    this.zoomAt(e.clientX-r.left, e.clientY-r.top, f);\n  }\n  zoomBy(f){ const r=this.area.getBoundingClientRect(); this.zoomAt(r.width/2, r.height/2, f); }\n  fit(){ if(!this.area) return; const r=this.area.getBoundingClientRect(); const s=Math.min(r.width/PW, r.height/PH)*0.96; this.setState({ scale:s, tx:(r.width-PW*s)/2, ty:(r.height-PH*s)/2 }, ()=>this.persist()); }\n\n  // ---- tool actions ----\n  toolClick(p, e){\n    const t=this.state.tool;\n    if(t==='calibrate'){ this.addCalibPoint(p); return; }\n    if(t==='cable'){ this.addCablePoint(p); return; }\n    if(TYPES[t]){ this.placeElement(t,p); return; }\n  }\n  placeElement(type,p){\n    this.pushUndo();\n    const n = this.state.elements.filter(el=>el.type===type).length+1;\n    const el = { id:'e'+Date.now().toString(36)+Math.floor(Math.random()*999), type, x:Math.round(p.x), y:Math.round(p.y), rot:0, circuit:this.state.activeCircuit, label:TYPES[type].prefix+n, model:'', watt:'', dim:'', note:'' };\n    this.setState(st=>({elements:[...st.elements, el], selected:{kind:'element',id:el.id}, rightTab:'props'}), ()=>this.persist());\n  }\n  addCablePoint(p){\n    const d=this.state.draft;\n    let np={x:Math.round(p.x),y:Math.round(p.y)};\n    if(this.state.ortho && d && d.points.length){ const l=d.points[d.points.length-1]; if(Math.abs(np.x-l.x)>Math.abs(np.y-l.y)) np.y=l.y; else np.x=l.x; }\n    if(!d){ this.pushUndo(); this.setState({draft:{points:[np]}}); }\n    else this.setState({draft:{points:[...d.points, np]}});\n  }\n  finishCable(){\n    const d=this.state.draft; if(!d){return;}\n    if(d.points.length>=2){ const cab={id:'k'+Date.now().toString(36), circuit:this.state.activeCircuit, cableType:this.state.activeCableType, points:d.points, dashed:false}; this.setState(st=>({cables:[...st.cables,cab], draft:null, mouse:null, selected:{kind:'cable',id:cab.id}}), ()=>this.persist()); }\n    else this.setState({draft:null, mouse:null});\n  }\n  addCalibPoint(p){\n    const c=this.state.calib;\n    if(!c){ this.setState({calib:{p1:p}}); }\n    else if(!c.p2){ this.setState({calib:{p1:c.p1,p2:p}, showCalibInput:true}); }\n  }\n\n  // ---- pointer ----\n  onDown(e){\n    if(e.button===2) return;\n    const space=this._space, t=this.state.tool, mid=e.button===1;\n    if(space||t==='pan'||mid){ this._pan={sx:e.clientX,sy:e.clientY,tx:this.state.tx,ty:this.state.ty}; try{this.area.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);}catch(_){ } return; }\n    const p=this.planPoint(e);\n    if(t==='select'){ this.setState({selected:null}); return; }\n    this.toolClick(p,e);\n  }\n  onElDown(id,e){\n    e.stopPropagation();\n    if(this.state.tool!=='select'){ this.toolClick(this.planPoint(e),e); return; }\n    this.pushUndo();\n    const el=this.state.elements.find(x=>x.id===id); const p=this.planPoint(e);\n    this._edrag={id, dx:el.x-p.x, dy:el.y-p.y, moved:false};\n    this.setState({selected:{kind:'element',id}, rightTab:'props'});\n    try{this.svg.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);}catch(_){}\n  }\n  onCableDown(id,e){\n    e.stopPropagation();\n    if(this.state.tool!=='select'){ this.toolClick(this.planPoint(e),e); return; }\n    this.setState({selected:{kind:'cable',id}, rightTab:'props'});\n  }\n  onVertDown(id,i,e){\n    e.stopPropagation();\n    if(this.state.tool!=='select') return;\n    this.pushUndo();\n    this._vdrag={id,i};\n    try{this.svg.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);}catch(_){}\n  }\n  onMove(e){\n    if(this._pan){ this.setState({ tx:this._pan.tx+(e.clientX-this._pan.sx), ty:this._pan.ty+(e.clientY-this._pan.sy) }); return; }\n    if(this._edrag){ const p=this.planPoint(e); const id=this._edrag.id; this._edrag.moved=true; this.setState(st=>({elements:st.elements.map(el=>el.id===id?{...el,x:Math.round(p.x+this._edrag.dx),y:Math.round(p.y+this._edrag.dy)}:el)})); return; }\n    if(this._vdrag){ const p=this.planPoint(e); const {id,i}=this._vdrag; this.setState(st=>({cables:st.cables.map(c=>{ if(c.id!==id) return c; const pts=c.points.slice(); pts[i]={x:Math.round(p.x),y:Math.round(p.y)}; return {...c,points:pts}; })})); return; }\n    if((this.state.tool==='cable'&&this.state.draft) || (this.state.tool==='calibrate'&&this.state.calib&&!this.state.calib.p2)){\n      const p=this.planPoint(e);\n      if(!this._raf){ this._raf=requestAnimationFrame(()=>{ this._raf=null; this.setState({mouse:p}); }); }\n    }\n  }\n  onUp(e){\n    if(this._pan){ this._pan=null; this.persist(); }\n    if(this._edrag){ this._edrag=null; this.persist(); }\n    if(this._vdrag){ this._vdrag=null; this.persist(); }\n  }\n  onDbl(e){ if(this.state.tool==='cable'&&this.state.draft) this.finishCable(); }\n  onContext(e){ if(this.state.draft){ e.preventDefault(); this.finishCable(); } }\n  onKey(e){\n    const tag=(e.target&&e.target.tagName)||''; const typing=/INPUT|TEXTAREA|SELECT/.test(tag);\n    if(e.code==='Space'&&!typing){ this._space=true; }\n    if((e.key==='Delete'||e.key==='Backspace')&&!typing){ this.deleteSelected(); }\n    if(e.key==='Escape'){ if(this.state.draft) this.setState({draft:null,mouse:null}); else if(this.state.calib) this.setState({calib:null,showCalibInput:false}); else this.setState({selected:null}); }\n    if((e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey)&&e.key.toLowerCase()==='z'&&!typing){ e.preventDefault(); this.undo(); }\n    if(!typing){ const map={v:'select',h:'pan',k:'cable',m:'calibrate'}; if(map[e.key]) this.setState({tool:map[e.key]}); }\n  }\n  componentDidUpdate(){ }\n  deleteSelected(){\n    const s=this.state.selected; if(!s) return; this.pushUndo();\n    if(s.kind==='element') this.setState(st=>({elements:st.elements.filter(e=>e.id!==s.id),selected:null}), ()=>this.persist());\n    else this.setState(st=>({cables:st.cables.filter(c=>c.id!==s.id),selected:null}), ()=>this.persist());\n  }\n\n  // ---- circuits ----\n  addCircuit(){ this.pushUndo(); const used=this.state.circuits.map(c=>c.color); const color=PALETTE.find(p=>!used.includes(p))||PALETTE[this.state.circuits.length%PALETTE.length]; const id='c'+Date.now().toString(36); const n=this.state.circuits.length+1; this.setState(st=>({circuits:[...st.circuits,{id,name:'Stromkreis '+n,color}], activeCircuit:id}), ()=>this.persist()); }\n  cycleColor(id){ this.pushUndo(); this.setState(st=>({circuits:st.circuits.map(c=>{ if(c.id!==id) return c; const i=PALETTE.indexOf(c.color); return {...c,color:PALETTE[(i+1)%PALETTE.length]}; })}), ()=>this.persist()); }\n  renameCircuit(id,v){ this.setState(st=>({circuits:st.circuits.map(c=>c.id===id?{...c,name:v}:c)}), ()=>this.persist()); }\n  delCircuit(id){ if(this.state.circuits.length<=1) return; this.pushUndo(); const fb=this.state.circuits.find(c=>c.id!==id).id; this.setState(st=>({circuits:st.circuits.filter(c=>c.id!==id), activeCircuit:st.activeCircuit===id?fb:st.activeCircuit, elements:st.elements.map(e=>e.circuit===id?{...e,circuit:fb}:e), cables:st.cables.map(c=>c.circuit===id?{...c,circuit:fb}:c)}), ()=>this.persist()); }\n\n  // ---- field edits ----\n  selEl(){ const s=this.state.selected; return s&&s.kind==='element'?this.state.elements.find(e=>e.id===s.id):null; }\n  selCab(){ const s=this.state.selected; return s&&s.kind==='cable'?this.state.cables.find(c=>c.id===s.id):null; }\n  editEl(field,v){ const s=this.state.selected; if(!s) return; this.setState(st=>({elements:st.elements.map(e=>e.id===s.id?{...e,[field]:v}:e)}), ()=>this.persist()); }\n  rotEl(d){ const s=this.state.selected; if(!s) return; this.pushUndo(); this.setState(st=>({elements:st.elements.map(e=>e.id===s.id?{...e,rot:((e.rot||0)+d+360)%360}:e)}), ()=>this.persist()); }\n  editCab(field,v){ const s=this.state.selected; if(!s) return; this.setState(st=>({cables:st.cables.map(c=>c.id===s.id?{...c,[field]:v}:c)}), ()=>this.persist()); }\n\n  // ---- calibration confirm ----\n  confirmCalib(){ const c=this.state.calib; const m=parseFloat(this.state.calibMeters); if(c&&c.p2&&m>0){ const px=Math.hypot(c.p2.x-c.p1.x,c.p2.y-c.p1.y); this.setState({scalePxPerM:px/m, calib:null, showCalibInput:false, calibMeters:'', tool:'select'}, ()=>this.persist()); } }\n\n  // ---- export ----\n  exportCsv(){\n    const st=this.state;\n    const circName=id=>{ const c=st.circuits.find(c=>c.id===id); return c?c.name:''; };\n    const esc=v=>{ v=(v==null?'':String(v)); return /[\";\\n]/.test(v)?'\"'+v.replace(/\"/g,'\"\"')+'\"':v; };\n    const rows=[];\n    rows.push(['ELEMENTE']);\n    rows.push(['Bezeichnung','Typ','Modell','Leistung (W)','Stromkreis','Dimmgruppe','Notiz','X','Y']);\n    st.elements.forEach(e=>rows.push([e.label,(TYPES[e.type]||{name:e.type}).name,e.model,e.watt,circName(e.circuit),e.dim,e.note,e.x,e.y]));\n    rows.push([]);\n    rows.push(['KABEL']);\n    rows.push(['Stromkreis','Kabeltyp','Länge (m)','Knickpunkte']);\n    st.cables.forEach(k=>{ const ct=CABLE_BY_ID[k.cableType]; const m=st.scalePxPerM?(this.cableLenPx(k.points)/st.scalePxPerM).toFixed(2).replace('.',','):''; rows.push([circName(k.circuit),ct?ct.name:'',m,k.points.length]); });\n    rows.push([]);\n    rows.push(['ZUSAMMENFASSUNG JE KABELTYP']);\n    rows.push(['Kabeltyp','Anzahl','Gesamtlänge (m)']);\n    CABLE_TYPES.forEach(ct=>{ const list=st.cables.filter(k=>k.cableType===ct.id); if(!list.length) return; const px=list.reduce((s,k)=>s+this.cableLenPx(k.points),0); const m=st.scalePxPerM?(px/st.scalePxPerM).toFixed(2).replace('.',','):''; rows.push([ct.name,list.length,m]); });\n    const csv='\\ufeff'+rows.map(r=>r.map(esc).join(';')).join('\\r\\n');\n    const blob=new Blob([csv],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8'});\n    const a=document.createElement('a'); a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download='Elektroplanung_EG.csv'; a.click(); setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href),1000);\n  }\n  exportPng(){\n    const planImg = this.area && this.area.querySelector('img');\n    const planSrc = this._planURL || (planImg && planImg.src);\n    if(!planSrc){ alert('Plan wird noch geladen – bitte einen Moment warten und erneut versuchen.'); return; }\n    this.setState({selected:null, draft:null, calib:null}, ()=>{\n      setTimeout(()=>{\n        try{\n          const clone=this.svg.cloneNode(true);\n          clone.setAttribute('width',PW); clone.setAttribute('height',PH);\n          clone.setAttribute('viewBox','0 0 '+PW+' '+PH);\n          const xml=new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(clone);\n          const blob=new Blob([xml],{type:'image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8'});\n          const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n          const plan=new Image();\n          plan.onload=()=>{\n            const cv=document.createElement('canvas'); cv.width=PW; cv.height=PH; const cx=cv.getContext('2d');\n            cx.fillStyle='#fff'; cx.fillRect(0,0,PW,PH); cx.drawImage(plan,0,0,PW,PH);\n            const ov=new Image();\n            ov.onload=()=>{ cx.drawImage(ov,0,0,PW,PH); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); cv.toBlob(b=>{ const a=document.createElement('a'); a.href=URL.createObjectURL(b); a.download='Elektroplanung_EG.png'; a.click(); setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href),1000); }); };\n            ov.onerror=()=>{ URL.revokeObjectURL(url); alert('Export der Zeichenebene fehlgeschlagen.'); };\n            ov.src=url;\n          };\n          plan.onerror=()=>{ alert('Export fehlgeschlagen – Plan nicht ladbar.'); };\n          plan.crossOrigin='anonymous';\n          plan.src=planSrc;\n        }catch(e){ alert('Export fehlgeschlagen: '+e.message); }\n      },60);\n    });\n  }\n\n  // ---- scene nodes ----\n  buildElements(){\n    const sel=this.state.selected;\n    return this.state.elements.map(el=>{\n      const color=this.circColor(el.circuit);\n      const isSel=sel&&sel.kind==='element'&&sel.id===el.id;\n      const r=16; const labelY=r+(el.type==='wall'?8:0)+19;\n      return h('g',{key:el.id, transform:`translate(${el.x} ${el.y})`, style:{cursor:this.state.tool==='select'?'move':'crosshair',pointerEvents:'auto'}, onPointerDown:(e)=>this.onElDown(el.id,e)},\n        isSel?h('circle',{key:'sel',cx:0,cy:0,r:r+9,fill:'rgba(37,99,235,.08)',stroke:'#1c2024',strokeWidth:1.4,strokeDasharray:'5 4'}):null,\n        h('g',{key:'sym',transform:`rotate(${el.rot||0})`}, ...symbolEls(el.type,color,r)),\n        h('text',{key:'lab',x:0,y:labelY,fontSize:15,fontWeight:600,fill:color,textAnchor:'middle',fontFamily:'IBM Plex Mono, monospace',style:{paintOrder:'stroke',stroke:'#fff',strokeWidth:3.5,strokeLinejoin:'round'}}, el.label)\n      );\n    });\n  }\n  buildCables(){\n    const sel=this.state.selected;\n    return this.state.cables.map(cab=>{\n      const color=this.circColor(cab.circuit);\n      const isSel=sel&&sel.kind==='cable'&&sel.id===cab.id;\n      const ct=CABLE_BY_ID[cab.cableType];\n      const dash = cab.dashed ? '14 10' : (ct?ct.dash:'none');\n      const dbl = cab.cableType==='cat7x2';\n      const pts=cab.points.map(p=>p.x+','+p.y).join(' ');\n      const len=this.fmtLen(this.cableLenPx(cab.points));\n      const tag=(ct?ct.short:'')+(len?(ct?'  ·  ':'')+len:'');\n      const mid=cab.points[Math.floor((cab.points.length-1)/2)];\n      const mid2=cab.points[Math.ceil((cab.points.length-1)/2)];\n      const lx=(mid.x+mid2.x)/2, ly=(mid.y+mid2.y)/2;\n      const kids=[\n        h('polyline',{key:'hit',points:pts,fill:'none',stroke:'transparent',strokeWidth:20,strokeLinejoin:'round',strokeLinecap:'round'}),\n      ];\n      if(dbl) kids.push(h('polyline',{key:'ln2',points:pts,fill:'none',stroke:color,strokeWidth:isSel?9:7,strokeLinejoin:'round',strokeLinecap:'round',opacity:.32}));\n      kids.push(h('polyline',{key:'ln',points:pts,fill:'none',stroke:color,strokeWidth:isSel?6:4.5,strokeLinejoin:'round',strokeLinecap:'round',strokeDasharray:dash}));\n      if(tag) kids.push(h('text',{key:'len',x:lx,y:ly-9,fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,fill:color,textAnchor:'middle',fontFamily:'IBM Plex Mono, monospace',style:{paintOrder:'stroke',stroke:'#fff',strokeWidth:3.5,strokeLinejoin:'round'}}, tag));\n      if(isSel) cab.points.forEach((p,i)=>kids.push(h('rect',{key:'v'+i,x:p.x-6,y:p.y-6,width:12,height:12,rx:2,fill:'#fff',stroke:'#1c2024',strokeWidth:1.6,style:{cursor:'grab'},onPointerDown:(e)=>this.onVertDown(cab.id,i,e)})));\n      return h('g',{key:cab.id, style:{cursor:'pointer',pointerEvents:'auto'}, onPointerDown:(e)=>this.onCableDown(cab.id,e)}, ...kids);\n    });\n  }\n  buildDraft(){\n    const d=this.state.draft; if(!d) return null;\n    const color=this.circColor(this.state.activeCircuit);\n    const ctd=CABLE_BY_ID[this.state.activeCableType];\n    let pts=d.points.slice();\n    if(this.state.mouse){ let m={x:this.state.mouse.x,y:this.state.mouse.y}; if(this.state.ortho&&pts.length){ const l=pts[pts.length-1]; if(Math.abs(m.x-l.x)>Math.abs(m.y-l.y)) m.y=l.y; else m.x=l.x; } pts=[...pts,m]; }\n    const ps=pts.map(p=>p.x+','+p.y).join(' ');\n    const kids=[h('polyline',{key:'l',points:ps,fill:'none',stroke:color,strokeWidth:4.5,strokeLinejoin:'round',strokeLinecap:'round',strokeDasharray:(ctd&&ctd.dash!=='none')?ctd.dash:'10 8',opacity:.85})];\n    d.points.forEach((p,i)=>kids.push(h('circle',{key:'p'+i,cx:p.x,cy:p.y,r:5,fill:'#fff',stroke:color,strokeWidth:2.5})));\n    if(this.state.scalePxPerM && pts.length>=2){ const ll=this.fmtLen(this.cableLenPx(pts)); const last=pts[pts.length-1]; kids.push(h('text',{key:'lab',x:last.x+12,y:last.y-12,fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,fill:color,fontFamily:'IBM Plex Mono, monospace',style:{paintOrder:'stroke',stroke:'#fff',strokeWidth:3.5,strokeLinejoin:'round'}}, ll)); }\n    return h('g',{key:'draft'}, ...kids);\n  }\n  buildCalib(){\n    const c=this.state.calib; if(!c) return null;\n    const p2 = c.p2 || (this.state.mouse?{x:this.state.mouse.x,y:this.state.mouse.y}:c.p1);\n    const kids=[h('line',{key:'l',x1:c.p1.x,y1:c.p1.y,x2:p2.x,y2:p2.y,stroke:'#e11d48',strokeWidth:3,strokeDasharray:'8 6'}),\n      h('circle',{key:'a',cx:c.p1.x,cy:c.p1.y,r:6,fill:'#fff',stroke:'#e11d48',strokeWidth:2.5}),\n      h('circle',{key:'b',cx:p2.x,cy:p2.y,r:6,fill:'#fff',stroke:'#e11d48',strokeWidth:2.5})];\n    return h('g',{key:'calib'}, ...kids);\n  }\n\n  renderVals(){\n    const st=this.state, accent=this.props.accentColor||'#2563eb';\n    if(!this._imgHref){ try{ this._imgHref = new URL('plan.png', document.baseURI).href; }catch(e){ this._imgHref='plan.png'; } }\n    const baseBtn={display:'flex',alignItems:'center',gap:'10px',padding:'7px 9px',borderRadius:'7px',cursor:'pointer',fontSize:'13px',fontWeight:500,color:'#3a4250'};\n    const actBtn=(active)=>active?{...baseBtn,background:'#eef1f4',color:accent,fontWeight:600,boxShadow:'inset 2.5px 0 0 '+accent}:baseBtn;\n    const mk=(id,label,key,iconKind)=>({label,key:key||'',title:label,icon:makeIcon(iconKind||id,id==='select'||id==='pan'||id==='cable'||id==='calibrate'?'#4b5560':this.circColor(st.activeCircuit)),style:actBtn(st.tool===id),onClick:()=>this.setState({tool:id})});\n    const navTools=[ mk('select','Auswahl','V','select'), mk('pan','Verschieben','H','pan'), mk('cable','Kabelweg','K','cable'), mk('calibrate','Maßstab','M','calibrate') ];\n    const placeGroups=CATS.map(c=>({name:c.name, tools:c.keys.map(t=>mk(t,TYPES[t].name,'',t))}));\n\n    const el=this.selEl(), cab=this.selCab();\n    const scaleLabel = st.scalePxPerM ? '1 m \\u2248 '+Math.round(st.scalePxPerM)+' px' : 'nicht gesetzt';\n    const zoomLabel = Math.round(st.scale*100)+' %';\n    const drawing = (st.tool==='cable'&&st.draft) || st.tool==='calibrate';\n    let hintText='';\n    if(st.tool==='cable') hintText = st.draft? 'Klicken für weitere Knickpunkte · Doppelklick / Rechtsklick beendet · Esc bricht ab' : 'Klicke, um den Kabelweg zu beginnen' + (st.ortho?' · rechtwinklig':'');\n    else if(st.tool==='calibrate') hintText = !st.calib? 'Klicke den ersten Punkt einer bekannten Strecke' : 'Klicke den zweiten Punkt';\n\n    // list\n    const circuitTotals = st.circuits.map(c=>{\n      const watt = st.elements.filter(e=>e.circuit===c.id).reduce((s,e)=>s+(parseFloat(e.watt)||0),0);\n      const lenpx = st.cables.filter(k=>k.circuit===c.id).reduce((s,k)=>s+this.cableLenPx(k.points),0);\n      const len = st.scalePxPerM ? (lenpx/st.scalePxPerM).toFixed(1)+' m' : '—';\n      return {color:c.color, name:c.name, watt: watt?watt+' W':'—', len};\n    });\n    const listRows = st.elements.map(e=>({\n      color:this.circColor(e.circuit), label:e.label, desc:((TYPES[e.type]||{name:e.type}).name)+(e.model?' · '+e.model:''), watt:e.watt?e.watt+' W':'',\n      style:{display:'flex',alignItems:'center',gap:'9px',padding:'7px 8px',borderRadius:'7px',cursor:'pointer',background:(st.selected&&st.selected.id===e.id)?'#eef1f4':'transparent'},\n      onClick:()=>this.setState({selected:{kind:'element',id:e.id}, rightTab:'props'})\n    }));\n    const totalWatt = st.elements.reduce((s,e)=>s+(parseFloat(e.watt)||0),0);\n    const totalLenPx = st.cables.reduce((s,k)=>s+this.cableLenPx(k.points),0);\n    const totalLen = st.scalePxPerM ? (totalLenPx/st.scalePxPerM).toFixed(1)+' m' : '—';\n    // Kabel je Typ\n    const cableTotals = CABLE_TYPES.map(ct=>{\n      const list = st.cables.filter(k=>k.cableType===ct.id);\n      if(!list.length) return null;\n      const px = list.reduce((s,k)=>s+this.cableLenPx(k.points),0);\n      return { name:ct.name, count:list.length, len: st.scalePxPerM ? (px/st.scalePxPerM).toFixed(1)+' m' : '—' };\n    }).filter(Boolean);\n\n    const circuitRows = st.circuits.map(c=>({\n      id:c.id, name:c.name, color:c.color,\n      count: st.elements.filter(e=>e.circuit===c.id).length + st.cables.filter(k=>k.circuit===c.id).length,\n      canDelete: st.circuits.length>1,\n      rowStyle:{display:'flex',alignItems:'center',gap:'8px',padding:'5px 7px',borderRadius:'7px',background:st.activeCircuit===c.id?'#eef1f4':'transparent',boxShadow:st.activeCircuit===c.id?('inset 0 0 0 1px '+c.color+'55'):'none'},\n      onActivate:()=>this.setState({activeCircuit:c.id}),\n      onName:(e)=>this.renameCircuit(c.id, e.target.value),\n      onColor:()=>this.cycleColor(c.id),\n      onDelete:()=>this.delCircuit(c.id),\n    }));\n\n    const tab=(name,active)=>({padding:'7px 14px',border:'0',borderRadius:'7px 7px 0 0',background:'transparent',cursor:'pointer',fontSize:'13px',fontWeight:active?600:500,color:active?'#1c2024':'#9aa1a8',borderBottom:active?'2px solid '+accent:'2px solid transparent'});\n\n    return {\n      navTools, placeGroups,\n      cableTypeOpts:CABLE_TYPES, activeCableType:st.activeCableType, onActiveCable:(e)=>this.setState({activeCableType:e.target.value},()=>this.persist()),\n      ortho:st.ortho, onToggleOrtho:()=>this.setState({ortho:!st.ortho}),\n      orthoBg: st.ortho?'#f1f3f5':'transparent',\n      activeColor:this.circColor(st.activeCircuit), activeName:(st.circuits.find(c=>c.id===st.activeCircuit)||{}).name||'—',\n      scaleLabel, zoomLabel,\n      planOpacity:st.planOpacity, onOpacity:(e)=>{ const v=parseFloat(e.target.value); this.setState({planOpacity:v},()=>this.persist()); },\n      onUndo:()=>this.undo(), onExportPng:()=>this.exportPng(), onExportCsv:()=>this.exportCsv(), onPrint:()=>window.print(),\n      svgRef:this.setSvg, areaRef:this.setArea, imgHref:this._imgHref,\n      areaStyle:{flex:'1',position:'relative',minWidth:'0',background:'#f4f5f6',overflow:'hidden',touchAction:'none',cursor: 0',transform:`translate(${st.tx}px,${st.ty}px) scale(${st.scale})`,willChange:'transform'},\n      overlayStyle:{position:'absolute',left:'0',top:'0',width:PW+'px',height:PH+'px',overflow:'visible',pointerEvents:'none'},\n      imgStyle:{position:'absolute',left:'0',top:'0',width:PW+'px',height:PH+'px',opacity:st.planOpacity,userSelect:'none',pointerEvents:'none'},\n      areaCursor: this._space||st.tool==='pan'?'grab':(st.tool==='select'?'default':'crosshair'),\n      onCanvasDown:(e)=>this.onDown(e), onCanvasMove:(e)=>this.onMove(e), onCanvasUp:(e)=>this.onUp(e), cablesNode:h(React.Fragment,null,...this.buildCables()),\n      elementsNode:h(React.Fragment,null,...this.buildElements()),\n      draftNode:this.buildDraft(), calibNode:this.buildCalib(),\n      showHint:!!hintText, hintText,\n      showCalibInput:st.showCalibInput, calibMeters:st.calibMeters,\n      onCalibInput:(e)=>this.setState({calibMeters:e.target.value}), onCalibConfirm:()=>this.confirmCalib(), onCalibCancel:()=>this.setState({calib:null,showCalibInput:false,calibMeters:''}),\n      // right panel\n      rightTab:st.rightTab, onTabProps:()=>this.setState({rightTab:'props'}), onTabList:()=>this.setState({rightTab:'list'}),\n      tabPropsStyle:tab('props',st.rightTab==='props'), tabListStyle:tab('list',st.rightTab==='list'),\n      showProps:st.rightTab==='props', showList:st.rightTab==='list',\n      selElement:!!el, selCable:!!cab, nothingSel:!el&&!cab,\n      circuits:st.circuits,\n      // element fields\n      selIcon: el?makeIcon(el.type,this.circColor(el.circuit)):null,\n      selTypeName: el?(TYPES[el.type]||{name:el.type}).name:'', selPos: el?('x '+el.x+'  ·  y '+el.y):'',\n      f_label: el?el.label:'', f_model: el?el.model:'', f_watt: el?el.watt:'', f_dim: el?el.dim:'', f_circuit: el?el.circuit:'', f_note: el?el.note:'', f_rot: el?((el.rot||0)+'\\u00b0'):'',\n      on_label:(e)=>this.editEl('label',e.target.value), on_model:(e)=>this.editEl('model',e.target.value), on_watt:(e)=>this.editEl('watt',e.target.value), on_dim:(e)=>this.editEl('dim',e.target.value), on_circuit:(e)=>this.editEl('circuit',e.target.value), on_note:(e)=>this.editEl('note',e.target.value),\n      on_rotL:()=>this.rotEl(-45), listEmpty:st.elements.length===0, totalCount:st.elements.length, totalWatt: totalWatt?totalWatt+' W':'0 W', totalLen,\n      circuitRows, onAddCircuit:()=>this.addCircuit(),\n    };\n  }\n}\n<\u002Fscript>\n\n\n<\u002Fbody><\u002Fhtml>"
  </script>
